CustomField.formula: case( Family ,"12-ESS", if ( Item_Class__c ="1", IGOR_Description__c ,if( Item_Class__c ="4","Accessories",if( Item_Class__c ="A","Software",if( Item_Class__c ="E","Custom Software",if( Item_Class__c ="H","Support,Training,Consult","Other"))))),if ( Item_Class__c ="1", IGOR_Description__c ,if( Item_Class__c ="2",IGOR_Description__c,if( Item_Class__c ="3","Consumable",if( Item_Class__c ="4","Accessories",if( Item_Class__c ="B","Reagents",if( Item_Class__c ="0",IGOR_Description__c,"Other")))))))
CustomField.label: Test
